ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the market record */,
  "equally_weighted" REAL /* Value of the equally weighted index */,
  "djia" REAL /* Value of the Dow Jones Industrial Average */,
  "lag_6" REAL /* Value representing performance over 6 lags */,
  "lag_11" REAL /* Value representing performance over 11 lags */,
  "lag_21" REAL /* Value representing performance over 21 lags */,
  "total_volumes" INTEGER /* Total trading volumes for the day */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Market sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare, Finance) */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index associated with the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of the index (e.g., weighted, unweighted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index including its purpose and calculation */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the investment */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the investment over time */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy used */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector where the investment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment associated with the metric */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "benchmark" REAL /* Benchmark value to compare against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role within the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return from the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted market value */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used to generate the forecast */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lag_analysis" (
  "lag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lag analysis record */,
  "lag_period" INTEGER /* Lag period in days */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data associated with this analysis */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric calculated for this lag period */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector where the lag analysis applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lag_analysis_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Description of the training data used */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
